creator: i.vaudrey@cableinet.co.uk
text:
Arrghh! Micro$oft's finest made a complete mess of the shell archive, so
here it comes again - with Eudora this time (don't ask why I can send it
from my FreeBSD box, it's a long story).

Just in case Eudora screws it up too, I've uploaded a copy to
ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/cgihtml.port.shar.gz

 - Ian
